description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test Python that runs on push, pull request, and merge group events. The workflow has a matrix job that tests Python 3.9 and 3.12 across 6 groups on ubuntu-22.04. It installs dependencies, builds, and tests with pytest, while also caching and uploading test durations. A separate job combines and updates integration test durations, and a final job checks if all needed jobs succeeded.
